goal: Check the directory layout of Russ's project for missing files and structural issues.

plan_steps.description: List all files in Russ's project directory.
acceptance_criteria: A comprehensive list of all files and directories within Russ's project is generated.

plan_steps.description: Identify missing critical files based on a predefined file structure template.
acceptance_criteria: A report detailing any missing critical files compared to the template is generated.

plan_steps.description: Check for structural issues such as misplaced or incorrectly named directories.
acceptance_criteria: A report identifying any structural issues in the directory layout is generated.

plan_steps.description: Document findings and suggest corrective actions for identified issues.
acceptance_criteria: A detailed document outlining missing files, structural issues, and recommended corrections is created.
